title: prevent creation of duplicate elements
excerpt: Please include a way to choose whether it is allowed to create duplicate elements… considering that this functionality is essential for a complete CMR, in many business cases it cannot be allowed for a salesperson to reg…

posts.author: Korok302 (IGOR DIAS EUFRASIO EUFRASIO)
posts.cookedHtml: Please include a way to choose whether it is allowed to create duplicate elements… considering that this functionality is essential for a complete CMR, in many business cases it cannot be allowed for a salesperson to register or register a lead that another salesperson already has. registered, this can cause a lot of trouble.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Korok302! Can I ask if this CRM feature is what you’re looking for?
